hooks.command: if [ "$CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE" = 'true' ]; then [ -z "$GIT_AUTHOR_NAME" ] && echo 'FATAL: GIT_AUTHOR_NAME not set. Configure it in your Claude Code environment at claude.ai/code.' && exit 1; [ -z "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL" ] && echo 'FATAL: GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL not set. Configure it in your Claude Code environment at claude.ai/code.' && exit 1; git config user.name "$GIT_AUTHOR_NAME" && git config user.email "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL"; fi
if [ ! -f node_modules/.modules.yaml ]; then echo 'pnpm store not linked — running install...'; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile; else echo 'node_modules already linked — skipping install'; fi
